name: Fenix
description: A sustained damage Assassin with a regenerating Shield that enables him to efficiently duel his opponents.
title: Steward of the Templar
info: As one of the greatest heroes in protoss history, Fenix's deeds on the battlefield are legendary. After falling to the zerg during the invasion of Aiur, his body was recovered and implanted into a dragoon so he could continue to fight. Not even death can stop Fenix from achieving glory and valor.

Fenix.name: Plasma Cutter
Fenix.description: Create a laser beam at the target point that circles around Fenix twice, dealing 135 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit and Slowing them by 25% for 4 seconds.

Fenix.name: Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon
Fenix.description: Basic Attack speed increased by 150%.  Activate to change to Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb, increasing Basic Attack range and damage, and causing Basic Attacks to splash.

Fenix.name: Warp
Fenix.description: Warp to a targeted location, phasing out after 0.5 seconds, and arriving 0.75 seconds later.

Fenix.name: Planet Cracker
Fenix.description: After 0.5 seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for 4 seconds, dealing 112 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.

Fenix.name: Purification Salvo
Fenix.description: Channel for 1.5 seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire 5 missiles at each locked Hero, dealing 79 (+4% per level) damage each. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.

Fenix.name: Shield Capacitor
Fenix.description: Fenix has a permanent 760 (+4% per level) Shield which regenerates at 10% per second after not taking damage for 5 seconds.

FenixPhaseBomb.name: Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb
FenixPhaseBomb.description: Basic Attacks have 1.25 increased range, deal 25% more damage, and splash to nearby enemies.  Activate to change to Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon, increasing Basic Attack speed.

1.name: Advanced Targeting
1.description: Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Plasma Cutter permanently increases Fenix's Basic Attack damage by 0.5, up to 60.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Plasma Cutter circles an additional time.

1.name: Arsenal Synergy
1.description: After hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks 3 times while Repeater Cannon is active, the next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb deals 150% more damage and splashes in a 50% larger area.

1.name: Mobile Offense
1.description: After moving, Fenix's next Basic Attack deals 35% more damage to Heroes.

4.name: Target Acquired
4.description: Basic Attacks against Slowed Heroes with Repeater Cannon active grant 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, up to 40%.

4.name: Inhibiting Energy
4.description: Every 10 seconds, Fenix's next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb active Slows all enemies hit by 60%, decaying over 1.5 seconds.

4.name: Emergency Protocol
4.description: While Fenix has shields from Shield Capacitor, he gains 10% Movement Speed. This bonus is increased to 15% when Fenix loses shields from Shield Capacitor.

7.name: Combat Advantage
7.description: Plasma Cutter deals 35% more damage to Slowed targets.

7.name: Warp Warfare
7.description: After arriving with Warp, gain 175% Attack Speed for 4 seconds while in Repeater Cannon mode. Hero Takedowns reset Warp's cooldown.

7.name: Divert Power: Weapons
7.description: Activate to gain 40% Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds. Basic Attacking a Hero refreshes this duration. Once Divert Power: Weapons ends, drain all of Shield Capacitor's Shields.

10.name: Purification Salvo
10.description: Channel for 1.5 seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire 5 missiles at each locked Hero, dealing 79 (+4% per level) damage each. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.

10.name: Planet Cracker
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for 4 seconds, dealing 112 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.

13.name: Adanium Shell
13.description: After arriving with Warp, gain 50 Armor for 4 seconds.

13.name: Dampening Field
13.description: Fenix gains 30 Spell Armor while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.

13.name: Rapid Recharge
13.description: The time before Shield Capacitor begins regenerating after taking damage is reduced by 2 seconds. Whenever Fenix is healed, Shield Capacitor's Shield recharges for 60% of the healing received.

13.name: Auxiliary Shields
13.description: Permanently reduce Fenix's maximum Health by 30% but increase Shield Capacitor's Shield by 40%. Basic Attacks regenerate Shields equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

16.name: Offensive Cadence
16.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against Heroes while Repeater Cannon is active deals an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health as damage.

16.name: Photonic Weaponry
16.description: Fenix deals 20% more damage while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.

16.name: Arsenal Overcharge
16.description: Basic Attacks with Repeater Cannon reduce Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds. Basic Attacks with Phase Bomb active reduce Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds per Hero hit.

20.name: Armageddon Beam
20.description: Planet Cracker's width increases by 100% over 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Planet Cracker's cooldown by 40 seconds.

20.name: Secondary Fire
20.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plasma Cutter fires a Purification Salvo missile at them after 0.5 seconds, dealing 79 (+4% per level) damage. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.

20.name: Singularity Charge
20.description: Repeater Cannon grants 100% more Attack Speed, and Phase Bomb grants 1.25 more range.

20.name: Unconquered Spirit
20.description: Upon taking fatal damage, Shield Capacitor regains 800 (+4% per level) Shields. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.

tooltipMarkup.FenixAdaniumShell: After arriving with Warp, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixAdaniumShellBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixAdaniumShellBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FenixAdvancedTargeting: Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Plasma Cutter permanently increases Fenix's Basic Attack damage by , up to .Reward: After hitting Heroes, Plasma Cutter circles an additional time.
tooltipMarkup.FenixArmageddonBeam: Planet Cracker's width increases by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPlanetCrackerArmageddonBeamTalentPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]*Effect,FenixPlanetCrackerArmageddonBeamTalentPersistent,PeriodCount"precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Reduce Planet Cracker's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,FenixArmageddonBeam,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FenixArsenalOvercharge: Basic Attacks with Repeater Cannon reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,FenixArsenalOverchargeModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacks with Phase Bomb active reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,FenixArsenalOverchargeModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c></c> seconds per Hero hit.
tooltipMarkup.FenixArsenalSynergy: After hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixPhaseBombArsenalSynergyToken,Max" precision="2"/></c> times while Repeater Cannon is active, the next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixHeroPhaseBombWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ArsenalSynergy].Modifier*100" precision="2"/>%</c> more damage and splashes in a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,FenixHeroWeaponPhaseBombArsenalSynergySplashSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius/Effect,FenixHeroWeaponPhaseBombSplashSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius-100" precision="2"/>%</c> larger area.
tooltipMarkup.FenixAuxiliaryShields: Permanently reduce Fenix's maximum Health by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixAuxiliaryShieldsBehavior,Modification.VitalMaxFractionArray[Life]*100*(-1)"/>%</c> but increase Shield Capacitor's Shield by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixAuxiliaryShieldsBehavior,Modification.VitalMaxFractionArray[Shields]*100"/>%</c>. Basic Attacks regenerate Shields equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixAuxiliaryShieldsBehavior,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Shields].KindArray[Basic]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.FenixCombatAdvantage: Plasma Cutter deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPlasmaCutterDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100" precision="2"/>%</c> more damage to Slowed targets.
tooltipMarkup.FenixDampeningField: Fenix gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixDampeningFieldSpellArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.
tooltipMarkup.FenixDivertPowerWeapons: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixDivertPowerWeapons,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100"/>%</c> Basic Attack damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixDivertPowerWeapons,Duration"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacking a Hero refreshes this duration. Once Divert Power: Weapons ends, drain all of Shield Capacitor's Shields.
tooltipMarkup.FenixEmergencyProtocol: While Fenix has shields from Shield Capacitor, he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FenixEmergencyProtocolCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed. This bonus is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FenixEmergencyProtocolBonusCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> when Fenix loses shields from Shield Capacitor.
tooltipMarkup.FenixInhibitingEnergy: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixPhaseBombInhibitingEnergyTalentCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, Fenix's next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb active Slows all enemies hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,FenixPhaseBombInhibitingEnergySlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c>, decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixPhaseBombInhibitingEnergySlow,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FenixMobileOffense: After moving, Fenix's next Basic Attack deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixHeroPhaseBombWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MobileOffense].Modifier*100" precision="2"/>%</c> more damage to Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.FenixOffensiveCadence: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack against Heroes while Repeater Cannon is active deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixOffensiveCadenceDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of the target's maximum Health as damage.
tooltipMarkup.FenixPhaseBomb: Basic Attack speed increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FenixRepeaterCannonBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Activate to change to <c val="#AbilityPassive">Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb</c>, increasing Basic Attack range and damage, and causing Basic Attacks to splash.
tooltipMarkup.FenixPhotonicWeaponry: Fenix deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FenixPhotonicWeaponryDamageBehavior,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]" precision="2"/>%</c> more damage while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.
tooltipMarkup.FenixPlanetCracker: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FenixPlanetCracker,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FenixPlanetCracker,CastOutroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPlanetCrackerDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPlanetCrackerInitialPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.
tooltipMarkup.FenixPlasmaCutter: Create a laser beam at the target point that circles around Fenix twice, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPlasmaCutterDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies hit and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,FenixPlasmaCutterSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixPlasmaCutterSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FenixPurificationSalvo: Channel for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixPurificationSalvoLaserUnitBehavior,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPurificationSalvoCreateTargetingPersistent,PeriodCount" player="0" precision="2"/></c> missiles at each locked Hero, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPurificationSalvoDamage,Amount"/></c> damage each. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPurificationSalvoDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Slowed].Modifier*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> increased damage to Slowed targets.
tooltipMarkup.FenixRapidRecharge: The time before Shield Capacitor begins regenerating after taking damage is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,FenixRapidRecharge,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. Whenever Fenix is healed, Shield Capacitor's Shield recharges for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixRapidRechargeHealingDummyModifyUnit,XP*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of the healing received.
tooltipMarkup.FenixRepeaterCannon: Basic Attacks have <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixPhaseBombBehavior,Modification.WeaponRange" precision="2" player="0"/></c> increased range, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixHeroPhaseBombWeaponDamage,Amount / Effect,FenixHeroWeaponDamage,Amount - 1 * 100" player="0"/>%</c> more damage, and splash to nearby enemies.<n/><n/>Activate to change to <c val="#AbilityPassive">Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon</c>, increasing Basic Attack speed.
tooltipMarkup.FenixSecondaryFire: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plasma Cutter fires a Purification Salvo missile at them after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPurificationSalvoPlasmaCutterCreateTargetingPersistent,InitialDelay" precision="2"/></c> seconds, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPurificationSalvoDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixPurificationSalvoDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Slowed].Modifier*100"/>%</c> increased damage to Slowed targets.
tooltipMarkup.FenixShieldCapacitor: Fenix has a permanent <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,HeroFenix,ShieldsMax"/></c> Shield which regenerates at <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,HeroFenix,ShieldRegenRate/Unit,HeroFenix,ShieldsMax*100" player="0"/>%</c> per second after not taking damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,HeroFenix,ShieldRegenDelay"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FenixSingularityCharge: Repeater Cannon grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,FenixSingularityCharge,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100" player="0"/>%</c> more Attack Speed, and Phase Bomb grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,FenixSingularityCharge,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].StringReplacement-Behavior,FenixPhaseBombBehavior,Modification.WeaponRange" precision="2" player="0"/></c> more range.
tooltipMarkup.FenixTargetAcquired: Basic Attacks against Slowed Heroes with Repeater Cannon active grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FenixTargetAcquiredSpeedBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FenixTargetAcquiredSpeedBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*Behavior,FenixTargetAcquiredSpeedBehavior,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.FenixUnconqueredSpirit: Upon taking fatal damage, Shield Capacitor regains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FenixUnconqueredSpiritShieldHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Shields. This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FenixUnconqueredSpirit,Cost[0].Cooldown.TimeUse" player="0"/></c> second cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.FenixWarp: Warp to a targeted location, phasing out after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FenixWarp,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, and arriving <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixWarpWarpingIn,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds later.
tooltipMarkup.FenixWarpWarfare: After arriving with Warp, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixWarpWarfareAttackSpeedBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100" precision="2"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FenixWarpWarfareAttackSpeedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds while in Repeater Cannon mode. Hero Takedowns reset Warp's cooldown.
